data.title: Nasdaq Surges Past 20,000 For First Time, Driven By Tech Gains And Rate Cut Hopes
data.description: The Nasdaq Composite crossed the historic 20,000-point threshold for the first time on Wednesday, driven by broad gains in technology stocks and increased expectations for Federal Reserve rate cuts in 2024.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Spike After Inflation Data Matches Expectations: Top Analyst Foresees New BTC ATH If It Stays Above This Level
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies rallied Wednesday after in-line inflation data boosted expectations of monetary easing by the Federal Reserve.

data.title: Sam Altman's '12 Days Of OpenAI' Christmas Magic Gets Interrupted By Uninvited Outage — ChatGPT Parent Says 'Identified A Pathway To Recovery'
data.description: OpenAI's widely-used ChatGPT service is experiencing a major disruption, affecting both free and premium users. Efforts are underway to restore normal operations.

data.title: Here's How Much You Would Have Made Owning Houlihan Lokey Stock In The Last 5 Years
Canadian Oil Sector Hedges Trump Tariff Risk, US Midwest Refineries Could Be Affected
data.description: A proposed 25% tariff on Canadian imports poses a considerable risk to the American Midwest, a region heavily reliant on Canadian oil imports.
